Export leads from LinkedIn Sales Navigator to CSV

Tired of manually copying contacts from LinkedIn Sales Navigator? NavBulk solves that. With one click, export your lead lists straight to a CSV file—perfect for Google Sheets or Excel. No fluff, no enrichment, just the raw data you need to qualify leads before clogging up your CRM.

Why You’ll Love It:

- Export entire Sales Navigator lists instantly—names, titles, companies, and 
more.
- Skip CRM imports until leads are vetted—keep your pipeline clean.
- Works seamlessly with your workflow—download, qualify, then act.

How It Works:

- Open your Sales Navigator lead list.
- Click the NavBulk icon.
-Select the number of pages you want to export
-Select all and scroll to the bottom of each page
- Get a tidy CSV file, ready for spreadsheets.

Built by a sales pro for sales pros, NavBulk cuts the busywork so you can focus on closing deals. Try it free—no setup, no nonsense.

Permissions: Accesses your active Sales Navigator tab to grab contact data and downloads it as a CSV. We don’t store or share anything—your data stays yours.

Use Case
Title: Qualifying Leads Without CRM Clutter
Scenario: You’re a sales rep building a lead list in LinkedIn Sales Navigator—say, 150 potential clients from a targeted search. You want to review their details (name, job title, company) and qualify them before adding them to your CRM like Salesforce or HubSpot. Sales Navigator doesn’t let you mass-export lists, and copying each contact by hand is a time suck. Plus, you don’t want unqualified leads gumming up your CRM reports.

How NavBulk Helps:

With NavBulk, you hit the extension icon while viewing your list, and it spits out a clean CSV file with all 150 contacts—ready to open in Google Sheets or Excel. You scan the list, mark your top prospects (e.g., “High Priority” in a new column), and only import the qualified ones into your CRM later. No manual copying, no premature CRM commits—just a fast, flexible way to work your leads.

Example Workflow:

Search “Marketing Directors in Tech” on Sales Navigator—50 results.
Click NavBulk—CSV downloads with names, titles, companies.
Open in Sheets, add notes (“Called 3/5, interested”), and filter for your A-listers.
Import only the 10 qualified leads into your CRM.
Result: You save hours, keep your CRM lean, and stay focused on the leads that matter.
מדידת אורך, היקף ושטח על תוכניות בניין ב-PDF/תמונה. כיול per-page, קבוצות, ייצוא PDF/Excel.

סביבת עבודה מקצועית למדידת אורך, היקף ושטח על גבי תוכניות בניין ומפות - מותאם במיוחד לשמאי מקרקעין.

תכונות עיקריות:
- מדידת שטח: סימון פוליגונים על גבי תוכניות וחישוב שטח מדויק במ"ר
- מדידת היקף: מדידת היקף חדרים ומבנים עם הצגת אורך כל קטע
- מדידת אורך: מדידת מרחקים בין נקודות על גבי תוכניות
- כיול (קליברציה): כיול מדויק של קנה המידה לפי מידה ידועה בתוכנית
- תיוג חדרים: הוספת שמות ותגיות לכל שטח שנמדד
- מחשבון כינון: חישוב עלויות בניה לפי שטח, עם אפשרות התאמת תעריפים
- חץ צפון: הוספת סימן כיוון צפון על התוכנית עם גרירה, סיבוב ושינוי גודל
- צילום מסך: צילום אזור נבחר עם טשטוש אוטומטי של אזורים שלא נמדדו
- ייצוא לאקסל: ייצוא כל נתוני המדידה לקובץ CSV
- סביבת עבודה מלאה: פתיחת PDF, תמונות וקבצי DXF ישירות בסביבת עבודה ייעודית
- הצמדת נקודות (Snapping): הצמדה אוטומטית לנקודות קיימות למדידה מדויקת

התוסף פועל ישירות על כל דף אינטרנט ותוכנית PDF, ומאפשר מדידות מהירות ומדויקות ללא צורך בתוכנות נוספות.

פותח על ידי ניר אהרוני - שמאות מקרקעין ליווי וייעוץ נדל"ן.


הצהרת אחריות (Disclaimer):
השימוש בתוסף זה ובכלים הכלולים בו הינו על אחריותו הבלעדית של המשתמש. התוסף נועד לשמש ככלי עזר מקצועי לביצוע אומדנים והערכות, אך הנתונים והחישובים המופקים ממנו אינם מהווים תחליף למדידה על ידי מודד מוסמך או לייעוץ הנדסי/משפטי פרטני. למפתח, ניר אהרוני, לא תהיה כל אחריות משפטית, ישירה או עקיפה, לכל נזק, הפסד, חסרון כיס או טעות שינבעו מהסתמכות על תוצאות המדידות, חישובי הכינון או כל שימוש אחר בתוסף.

F-Marketplace Scraper: Export Listings, Reviews, Sellers & More
Facebook Marketplace Scraper: Extract Facebook Marketplace prices, details, profiles & more. Export to CSV, JSON, XLSX with ease.

Extract and export listings, seller profiles, and reviews from Facebook Marketplace using this browser extension. All data processing runs locally in your browser, keeping your scraped information on your machine. The tool supports monitoring so you can track listing changes and receive alerts when specific conditions are met.

Key Features

✓ Monitor any Facebook Marketplace page for changes with instant alerts
✓ All data extraction and processing happens locally in your browser
✓ Export to CSV, Excel (XLSX), JSON, HTML Table, and Raw JSON
✓ Automatic pagination through search results via infinite scroll
✓ Batch process multiple listing URLs in a single session
✓ Customizable field selection and conditional formatting

What Data You Can Extract

Listings: Titles, prices, formatted prices, location city and state, image URLs, seller IDs, listing status (live, pending, sold), delivery types, and category IDs from Facebook Marketplace search results.

Listing Details: Full descriptions, creation times, conditions, shipping options, GPS coordinates (latitude and longitude), all images, all videos, purchase protection status, and cart availability from individual Facebook Marketplace listing pages.

Seller Profiles: Names, join times, follower counts, average ratings, total ratings, inventory counts, good and bad attributes, verification badge status, and vacation mode from Facebook Marketplace seller pages.

Seller Reviews: Review text, rater names, rater profile pictures, reaction counts, rating values, creation times, rating attributes, and response details from Facebook Marketplace review sections.

Monitoring & Alerts

Use the Page Watcher to track changes on any Facebook Marketplace page over time. Set conditions on specific fields, such as price drops or newly listed items in a category. Receive instant notifications via webhook or ntfy.sh when your conditions are met, keeping you informed without manual checking.

Batch Processing

The Batch URL Opener lets you queue multiple Facebook Marketplace URLs for processing in one session. Add URLs manually or auto-collect them from search result pages. The extension processes each URL, extracts the data, and compiles everything into a single export file.

Export Formats

CSV, Excel (XLSX), JSON, HTML Table, Raw JSON

Perfect For

Ideal for bargain hunters, resellers, and researchers who need to compile marketplace data at scale. This tool simplifies the process of gathering listings, seller information, and reviews from Facebook Marketplace for personal or professional analysis.

Supported Regions

This extension supports Facebook Marketplace across all regions where the platform is available, including North America, Europe, Asia, and other international markets.

Privacy & Security

All scraping and data exports are processed locally on your machine. The extension collects general usage metrics to improve performance and reliability, but your scraped data is never sent to external servers.

Usage Notice

This extension provides tools for extracting publicly available data. Users are responsible for ensuring their use complies with applicable terms of service and local regulations. The developer provides the tool and is not liable for how it is used.

Technical Support

For assistance or questions, contact hello@nifty.codes.

Trademark

Facebook Marketplace is a registered trademark of Meta Platforms, Inc. This extension is an independent tool and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, authorized, maintained, or sponsored by Meta Platforms, Inc.

T-Reviews Scraper: Export Reviews, Companies, Ratings & More
Trustpilot Scraper: Collect company profiles, user reviews & trust scores from Trustpilot. Export to CSV, JSON, XLSX easily.

Extract and monitor review data, company profiles, and trust scores from Trustpilot with this browser extension. Collect reviews, company information, and user review histories directly from your browser. All data processing happens locally on your machine, keeping your information private. Set up monitoring to track new reviews, rating changes, or trust score updates and receive instant alerts.

Key Features

✓ Monitor pages for changes and receive alerts when conditions are met
✓ All scraping and exports processed locally on your machine
✓ Export to CSV, Excel (XLSX), JSON, HTML Table, and Raw JSON
✓ Automatic pagination for continuous data collection
✓ Batch process multiple URLs in a single session
✓ Customizable fields to tailor extracted data to your needs

What Data You Can Extract

Reviews in a List: Captures review titles, text, ratings, dates, languages, like counts, verification status, source names, experience dates, updated dates, reviewer names, images, countries, review counts, company replies, and reply dates from Trustpilot company review pages.

Company Information: Extracts company names, websites, website titles, logos, descriptions, categories, primary categories, trust scores, star ratings, review counts, addresses, cities, countries, postal codes, emails, phone numbers, verification statuses for business, payment, Google, and identity, claimed status, claimed dates, paid feature usage, reply rates, average reply days, last reply dates, negative review counts, negative reviews with replies, AI response usage, and information sources from individual Trustpilot company pages.

Companies in a List: Collects company names, websites, logos, trust scores, star ratings, review counts, categories, addresses, cities, countries, postal codes, emails, phone numbers, and URLs from Trustpilot category and search result pages.

User Reviews in a List: Gathers review titles, text, ratings, dates, languages, like counts, verification status, source names, experience dates, updated dates, reviewer names, images, countries, review counts, company names, company IDs, company URLs, company replies, and reply dates from Trustpilot user profile pages.

Monitoring & Alerts

Page Watcher lets you track changes on any Trustpilot page and get notified instantly. Set conditions on specific fields you care about, such as trust scores, review counts, or star ratings, and receive alerts via webhook or ntfy.sh when those conditions are met. Schedule regular checks to stay on top of reputation changes.

Batch Processing

Batch URL Opener allows you to queue multiple Trustpilot URLs and process them all in one session. Add URLs manually or auto-collect them from a category or search results page, then batch-process and export all results together. This is ideal for collecting review data across many companies efficiently.

Export Formats

CSV, Excel (XLSX), JSON, HTML Table, Raw JSON. Choose the format that best fits your workflow, whether you need spreadsheet-compatible files or structured data for further analysis.

Perfect For

This extension is ideal for reputation analysts, customer experience researchers, and brand managers who need to collect and analyze public Trustpilot data at scale. Use it to benchmark company ratings, analyze review sentiment, or track trust score trends across the Trustpilot platform.

Supported Regions

This extension supports Trustpilot globally, working across all regional versions of the Trustpilot website including localized domains for various countries.

Privacy & Security

All scraping and exports are processed locally on your machine. No scraped data leaves your browser. Note that general usage metrics are collected to help improve the extension.

Usage Notice

This extension provides tools for extracting publicly available data. Users are responsible for ensuring their use complies with applicable terms of service and local regulations. The developer provides the tool and is not liable for how it is used.

Technical Support

For assistance or questions, contact hello@nifty.codes.

Trademark

Trustpilot is a registered trademark of Trustpilot A/S. This extension is an independent tool and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, authorized, maintained, or sponsored by Trustpilot A/S.

T-Feeds Scraper: Export Posts, Followers, Profiles & More
Threads Scraper: Collect following lists, user details & search data from Threads. Export to CSV, JSON, XLSX instantly.

Extract posts, user profiles, follower lists, and following lists directly from Threads with this browser extension. This tool automates the collection of publicly available social data from profiles, feeds, and search results. All processing happens locally in your browser for fast, private operation. Monitor any profile or feed for changes and receive instant alerts when new activity occurs.

Key Features

✓ Monitor any Threads profile or feed for changes with configurable alerts
✓ All scraping and data processing performed locally in your browser
✓ Export to CSV, Excel (XLSX), JSON, HTML Table, and Raw JSON
✓ Automatic pagination for complete data collection from long lists
✓ Batch processing for scraping multiple profiles in a single session
✓ Customizable field selection and conditional formatting

What Data You Can Extract

Posts: Thread ID, thread code, thread URL, username, full name, profile picture URL, verification status, text content, caption text, like count, reshare count, direct reply count, repost count, quote count, posted date, media type, link previews, and reply control settings.
User Details: User ID, username, full name, biography, follower count, profile picture URLs (standard and HD), verification status, privacy settings, friendship status (followed by, following, outgoing/incoming requests, blocking), bio links, profile tags, and fediverse settings.
Followers: User ID, username, full name, follower count, profile picture URL, verification status, privacy settings, and friendship status details.
Following: User ID, username, full name, follower count, profile picture URL, verification status, privacy settings, and friendship status details.

Monitoring and Alerts

Use the Page Watcher to track changes on any Threads profile or feed page over time. Set conditions on specific fields such as follower count, post engagement metrics, or verification status. Receive notifications via webhook or ntfy.sh whenever your defined conditions are met, keeping you updated on profile growth and content activity.

Batch Processing

The Batch URL Opener lets you queue multiple Threads profile URLs for automated scraping. Add URLs manually or auto-collect them from follower and following lists. The extension processes each page sequentially, gathering data and compiling results into a single export file.

Export Formats

CSV, Excel (XLSX), JSON, HTML Table, Raw JSON

Perfect For

This extension is ideal for social media researchers, brand analysts, and community managers who need to collect public data from Threads. It streamlines gathering engagement metrics, tracking profile growth, and archiving post content for analysis.

Supported Regions

This extension supports Threads globally, working across all regions where the platform is accessible.

Privacy and Security

All data extraction and exports occur locally on your device. General usage metrics are collected to improve the extension, but no scraped content is transmitted to external servers.

Usage Notice

This extension provides tools for extracting publicly available data. Users are responsible for ensuring their use complies with applicable terms of service and local regulations. The developer provides the tool and is not liable for how it is used.

Technical Support

For assistance or questions, contact hello@nifty.codes.

Trademark

Threads is a registered trademark of Meta Platforms, Inc. This extension is an independent tool and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, authorized, maintained, or sponsored by Meta Platforms, Inc.
V-Thrift Scraper: Export Listings, Sellers, Reviews & More
Vinted Scraper: Collect product details, pricing, seller profiles & feedback data. Export to CSV, JSON, XLSX instantly.

Scrape and monitor secondhand fashion marketplace data with this powerful browser extension. This tool extracts listings, seller profiles, and reviews directly from Vinted pages, processing everything locally in your browser. Built-in monitoring features let you track changes to any page and receive alerts when conditions you define are met.

Key Features
✓ Monitor any Vinted page for changes with configurable conditions and instant alerts
✓ All data processing happens locally in your browser for maximum privacy
✓ Export to CSV, Excel (XLSX), JSON, HTML Table, and Raw JSON formats
✓ Automatic pagination to collect data across multiple pages seamlessly
✓ Batch process multiple URLs in a single session
✓ Customizable field selection to export only the data you need
✓ Support for all Vinted regional domains

What Data You Can Extract

Products in a List: Title, price, brand, size, status, URL, photos, favorites count, seller ID, seller username, promotion status, and creation date.

Product Details: Full description, category, color, material, view count, upload date, shipping prices, item availability, seller rating, and feedback count.

Seller Details: Username, location, item counts, rating, positive/neutral/negative feedback, follower and following counts, verification status, holiday mode, and bundle discount info.

Seller Reviews: Item title, reviewer username, rating, feedback text, feedback date, seller comments, and profile links.

Monitoring & Alerts
Page Watcher lets you track changes on any Vinted page automatically. Set specific conditions on fields you care about, such as price drops or new listings, and receive instant notifications via webhook or ntfy.sh when those conditions are met.

Batch Processing
Batch URL Opener allows you to queue multiple Vinted URLs and process them all at once. Add URLs manually or auto-collect them from search result pages, then batch-scrape and export everything in a single operation.

Export Formats
- CSV
- Excel (XLSX)
- JSON
- HTML Table
- Raw JSON

Perfect For
This tool is ideal for resellers tracking inventory and pricing trends, researchers analyzing secondhand fashion markets, and anyone who needs to archive or compare Vinted listing data across regions.

Supported Regions
The extension supports Vinted domains across all available regions, including the US, UK, France, Germany, Italy, Spain, Netherlands, Poland, and many more European markets.

Privacy & Security
All scraping and data exports are processed locally in your browser. No scraped data is sent to external servers. General usage metrics are collected to help improve the extension.

Usage Notice
This extension provides tools for extracting publicly available data. Users are responsible for ensuring their use complies with applicable terms of service and local regulations. The developer provides the tool and is not liable for how it is used.

Technical Support
For assistance or questions, contact hello@nifty.codes.

Trademark
Vinted is a registered trademark of Vinted UAB. This extension is an independent tool and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, authorized, maintained, or sponsored by Vinted UAB.
Automatically rename downloaded files based on user-defined patterns

## [1.3.0] - 2026-03-10

### 🎆 Major New Features
- **Custom Placeholder Types**: Three types of custom placeholders now available:
  - **Text**: Add static text like "Invoice" or "Report" to filenames
  - **Counter**: Auto-incrementing numbers with zero-padding (e.g., 001, 002, 003)
  - **Regex**: Extract data from URLs using regex patterns (existing behavior)

### ✨ Enhancements
- **Type-aware UI**: Custom placeholder form adapts fields based on selected type
- **Counter reset**: Reset button to restart counter from its start value
- **Name validation**: Prevents reserved names and invalid characters in placeholder names

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- Fixed review feedback issues for custom placeholder type handling

### 📖 Documentation
- Added design spec and implementation plan for custom placeholder types

 General Download Renamer                                                                                         
   
  Automatically rename your downloads using custom patterns. Build filename templates with a visual drag-and-drop  
  interface — no coding required.                                       

  Features:
  - Drag-and-drop pattern builder with smart placeholders (domain, date, time, original filename, and more)
  - Custom placeholders: add static text, auto-incrementing counters, or extract data from URLs with regex
  - Automatic file categorization into 11 built-in categories (Documents, Images, Videos, and more)
  - Custom separators between filename parts
  - Floating icon on every page for quick enable/disable
  - Real-time filename preview before download
  - All settings sync and persist across browser restarts

  Example patterns:
  - {date}_{originalFilename} → 20260310_report.pdf
  - {category}/{domain}_{originalFilename} → Documents/google.com_report.pdf
  - Invoice_{counter} → Invoice_001.pdf, Invoice_002.pdf, Invoice_003.pdf

  Works with all file types. Fully customizable. No data collected.

Instantly inspect elements and explore CSS properties, XPath, and more. Easily export assets, color palettes, and typography.

CSS Peek: Element Inspector helps you instantly inspect any element on a webpage, explore its CSS box model, styles, colors, and typography, and export assets, color palettes, and typography styles in just a few clicks.

✨ Features:

- Click any element to view its full CSS styles.

- Visual box model diagram with color-coded layers and pixel values inside each layer.

- Inspect and copy the color palette of the page.

- Inspect and copy typography and fonts used on the page.

- View and download assets from the webpage.

- Manipulate the selected element’s styles in the Manipulate tab, with the ability to persist CSS changes across multiple websites. Each website has its own dedicated storage for saved styles.

- A live color picker that allows selecting a color from anywhere on the page and updating the UI preview in real-time.

- When an image element is selected, you can drag & drop a new image directly onto it.

- The extension allows adjusting CSS of the selected element using keyboard shortcuts. This helps test spacing, sizing, colors, etc., without touching the code.

- XPath Locator that finds both absolute and relative XPath selectors for an element, suggests improvements for more stable locators, and generates ready-to-use Playwright and Cypress code snippets.

- Smart Mode Inspector enables fast element inspection while hovering, with an integrated accessibility checker.

- Ability to toggle the main hover inspector on and off, allowing you to interact with the page (click buttons, navigate, etc.) and then re-enable it to continue inspecting elements.

- Accessibility tab where you can find a complete report of the accessibility status of the current page with suggestions how to fix the issues where needed.

- Light/Dark mode switcher.

Allows users to use UNC links

FileTrail Web Application - Local/UNC File Download 
Adds support to the "file" URI scheme in Chrome (file://) to open files stored on a local drive or network from within the FileTrail application.  
By default, Chrome prevents the download of local files using the file URI scheme, requiring the user to copy the local file path from FileTrail and paste it into a separate browser tab/window or into Windows Explorer.
With this extension, local file paths stored in FileTrail can now be retrieved with a single click, opening the file in your computer's default application (ex: Word or Excel).
